record.field: Convex is an open-source reactive database and TypeScript backend platform that keeps your application data in sync in real time, with no manual cache invalidation.

Convex is an open-source reactive database and TypeScript backend platform that keeps your application data in sync in real time, with no manual cache invalidation.

Convex combines a transactional document database, server-side functions written in pure TypeScript, and real-time client libraries into a single backend. Queries automatically re-run and push updates to connected clients whenever underlying data changes, giving live-updating apps strong consistency without bespoke websocket or polling code. The backend is written in Rust and ships as ready-made Docker images for self-hosting, backed by SQLite, PostgreSQL, or MySQL.

Key features
  • Reactive queries that re-run and push live updates automatically with ACID guarantees
  • Server functions (queries, mutations, actions) and schemas authored in pure TypeScript
  • Self-hostable backend and dashboard via Docker, on SQLite, PostgreSQL, or MySQL
  • Built-in file storage, full-text and vector search, scheduled functions, and cron jobs
  • Framework-agnostic clients for React, Next.js, React Native, Vue, Svelte, plus Python and Rust
  • Optional S3-compatible object storage for exports, snapshots, and search indexes
Best for

Full-stack and AI/agent developers building live-updating, real-time applications who want a single TypeScript backend with database, business logic, and sync, and the option to self-host for control, compliance, or to avoid vendor lock-in.

services: backend: image: ghcr.io/get-convex/convex-backend:5cdea511cd6527a95dd24152ea0d3c3bb2ab379f expose: - '3210' - '3211' volumes: - ./data:/convex/data environment: - INSTANCE_NAME=${INSTANCE_NAME:-} - INSTANCE_SECRET=${INSTANCE_SECRET:-} - CONVEX_RELEASE_VERSION_DEV=${CONVEX_RELEASE_VERSION_DEV:-} - ACTIONS_USER_TIMEOUT_SECS=${ACTIONS_USER_TIMEOUT_SECS:-} - CONVEX_CLOUD_ORIGIN=${CONVEX_CLOUD_ORIGIN:-http://127.0.0.1:3210} - CONVEX_SITE_ORIGIN=${CONVEX_SITE_ORIGIN:-http://127.0.0.1:3211} - DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-} - DISABLE_BEACON=${DISABLE_BEACON:-FALSE} - REDACT_LOGS_TO_CLIENT=${REDACT_LOGS_TO_CLIENT:-} - RUST_LOG=${RUST_LOG:-info} - RUST_BACKTRACE=${RUST_BACKTRACE:-} healthcheck: test: curl -f http://localhost:3210/version interval: 5s start_period: 5s container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_backend' restart: unless-stopped networks: - internal dashboard: image: ghcr.io/get-convex/convex-dashboard:5cdea511cd6527a95dd24152ea0d3c3bb2ab379f expose: - '6791' environment: - NEXT_PUBLIC_DEPLOYMENT_URL=${NEXT_PUBLIC_DEPLOYMENT_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:3210} depends_on: backend: condition: service_healthy container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}' restart: unless-stopped ports: - '{{ PORT_HTTP }}:6791' networks: - internal - agz-proxy-network networks: internal: driver: bridge agz-proxy-network: external: true
